transcript_facts:
- [Findings] so , susan is a 26-year-old female here for a high blood pressure check . susan , what's going on with your blood pressure ? so , i wanted to come in and see if there's any type of new medication i can be on to help it get steady or if there is diet restrictions i should take , um , things like that .
- [Findings] and what are your blood pressures running at home ?
- [Findings] so , let's go ahead and we'll do a quick physical exam .
- [Findings] i do hear a slight , uh , two out of six systolic ejection murmur .
- [Findings] hey , dragon , show me the creatinine . so , your kidney function looks really good . hey , dragon , show me the ekg . and your ekg looks great , uh , perfectly normal , so that's good . um , so , my impression of you at this time ... , let me see your blood pressure . hey , dragon , show me the blood pressure .
- [Findings] so , let's go ahead and we'll put you on ... so , my impression of you is that your , your blood pressure is high and the norvasc is n't controlling it .
- [Findings] and that will help bring your blood pressure down , okay ?
- [Findings] uh , i'd also like to go ahead and , uh , get a lipid panel and some routine labs on you just to make sure that everything is okay . hey , dragon , order a lipid panel . hey , dragon , order a complete metabolic panel .
- [Findings] your kidney function looks great , so we're just gon na continue you on all of those medications . so , the nurse will come in soon and she'll help you schedule all of the al- schedule a follow-up appointment with me , and we'll see what your blood pressure looks like in a couple weeks after taking that medication .
- [History of Present Illness] so , i've always struggled with , um , high blood pressure , but it's seeming to get really out of control lately .
- [History of Present Illness] and , have you had any headaches ? i have had some headaches . i do n't know if that's just because of more stress at work or , um , because of the high blood pressure .
- [History of Present Illness] so , you've had some headaches . have you had any chest pain , shortness of breath , anything like that ?
- [History of Present Illness] and you're taking all of your auto , um , i- um , your immunosuppression medications ?
- [History of Present Illness] so , looking at you , you do n't appear any distress . your heart is irregular rate and rhythm .
- [History of Present Illness] and you have no lower extremity edema .
- [Plan] so , i know that we've had you on the norvasc and we had to increase your dose , so you're on 10 milligrams a day now .
- [Plan] um , and , you know , i know that you've had a kidney transplant a few years ago .
- [Plan] i do see the scar on the left , uh , left plank for your kidney transplant which is healed .
- [Plan] so , that's really promising after your transplant .
- [Plan] so , what i would like to do is prescribe you coreg 25 milligrams , twice a day .
- [Plan] hey , dragon , order carvedilol 25 milligrams , twice a day .
